com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

Interface IXConstraint

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXAdditionalWireLengthConstraint, IXAllocateFunctionConstraint, IXAssignConductorsToHoleConstraint, IXAssignConnectorConstraint, IXAssignSignalConstraint, IXBackshellTerminationConstraint, IXCavityDetailGeneratorConstraint, IXCavityMappingConstraint, IXCenterStripSpliceConstraint, IXConductorCombinationConstraint, IXCostInlineJunctionBoxConstraint, IXCostMultitermConstraint, IXCostSpliceConstraint, IXCostWireConstraint, IXCreateBypassWiringConstraint, IXFootprintConstraint, IXFunctionalModuleAssignationConstraint, IXFunctionalModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint, IXFunctionalModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint, IXGroundCombinationConstraint, IXMapToSameCavityBySignalConstraint, IXMaxCavitiesPerGroundConnectorConstraint, IXMaxGroundSignalsPerMultitermConstraint, IXMaxWiresPerMultitermConstraint, IXMaxWiresPerSpliceConstraint, IXMinSpliceDistanceConstraint, IXMinSpliceSeparationConstraint, IXModuleAssignationConstraint<XMC>, IXModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint<XMC>, IXModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint<XMC>, IXMulticoreAttributeConstraint, IXMulticoreTakeoutConstraint, IXMultitermGroundDevicesConstraint, IXNetToWireConstraint, IXNetworkSpecificationConstraint, IXNetworkTerminationConstraint, IXOptionPlacementConstraint, IXPigtailUsageConstraint, IXPlaceInlineHalfConstraint, IXPlacementConstraint, IXPlaceSpliceOnBundleConstraint, IXProductionModuleAssignationConstraint, IXProductionModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint, IXProductionModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint, IXProtectSignalWiringConstraint, IXRoutingConstraint, IXSetAttributeConstraint, IXSingleEndedCoresConstraint, IXSpliceAttributeConstraint, IXSplicePositionBundleExclusionConstraint, IXSplicePositionCostConstraint, IXSubAssemblyNameConstraint, IXSubAssemblyPartNumberConstraint, IXTerminateShieldToPigtailConstraint, IXTopologyMinSpliceSeparationConstraint, IXTopologyRoutingConstraint, IXWireAttributeConstraint, IXWireRoutingConstraint, IXWireTerminalSpecConstraint

    @NotToBeImplementedDirectly
public interface IXConstraint
extends IXPlugin
    Base class for all constraints. NOT TO BE USED DIRECTLY.
